title: Siraya Tech Flex TPU Filament - 85A Shore, ISO 10993, High Flexibility & Toughness, High Flow & Speed, Easy to Print, Moisture-Resistant Aluminum Bag - Ideal for Footwear, Protective Gear (Black, 1kg)
features: Superior Flexibility & Toughness: Siraya Tech's Flex TPU 85A 3d printer filament excels in flexibility and elasticity, making it ideal for durable, bendable 3D prints. Perfect for softer, pliable projects.
Effortless Printing Experience: Compatible with most 3D printers, our Flex TPU filament guarantees a smooth and reliable printing process, suitable for both beginners and experts.

Long-Lasting Quality with Special Packaging: Our Flex TPU 3d printer filament is sealed in moisture-resistant aluminum resealable bags, preventing water absorption and ensuring up to 3 years of shelf life and consistent print quality.
Versatile for Various Applications: From custom footwear to medical devices, this Flex TPU filament 1.75mm meets diverse needs in creative and industrial settings.

Easier to print – Our specially formulated Flex Tpu 3d printer filament ensures smoother extrusion and superior adhesion, significantly easing the printing process. For the optimal printing experience, we recommend using a direct drive style extruder.
description: Product Description High Flexibility & Toughness Siraya Tech Flex TPU Filament: Unleashing Unparalleled Flexibility & Durability for Your 3D Printing. Durable Siraya Tech Flex TPU 3D Printer Filament is durable, not easy to break, effortlessly supports substantial weight. Bendable Bend It, Twist It: Superior Flexibility Meets Exceptional Toughness. Discover the potential of Flex TPU Filament 85A for your most demanding projects. Previous page Next page 1 ISO Biocompatibility 2 High Impact Resistance 3 Durable and Bendable 4 Aluminum Foil Packaging Easier to Print Smooth Printing, Remarkable Results: Flex TPU's reliable printing experience opens a world of possibilities, from prototyping to finished products. Preparing for Printing (1) Printer Compatibility Flex TPU 85A is optimized for FDM printers equipped with direct drive extruders, which are located on the toolhead for enhanced filament control. This setup is crucial for successful TPU printing. For best results, mount the filament directly above the extruder to facilitate the shortest and most efficient path from the spool to the extruder, thus significantly enhancing the print quality and success rate. (2) Print Bed Preparation A clean, level print bed is essential. We recommend a heated bed temperature ranging from 20°C to 50°C, adjusted according to your printer’s capabilities.
